overview.short: Gorakhgad Fort is a fort located 24 km from Murbad, Thane district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Gorakhgad Fort is a fort located 24 km from Murbad, Thane district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Thane district. This fort was mainly used by sadhus or hermits for meditation.and also by local people's of surrounding village, It was also used to guard the ancient trade route passing through Naneghat.

topPlaces.name: Ahupe
topPlaces.description: Ahupe is a village in Ambegaon taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

topPlaces.name: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary was created in the Ambegaon and Khed talukas of Pune District, in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra in order mainly to protect the habitat of the Indian Giant Squirrel. It spreads through 3 districts of Maharashtra; Pune District, Raigad District and Thane District.

items.note: Ahupe is a village in Ambegaon taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary was created in the Ambegaon and Khed talukas of Pune District, in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra in order mainly to protect the habitat of the Indian Giant Squirrel. It spreads through 3 districts of Maharashtra; Pune District, Raigad District and Thane District.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gorakhgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gorakhgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (72 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gorakhgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gorakhgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gorakhgad?
faq.a: Stays in Gorakhgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gorakhgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ahupe, Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary.
